title: test.apiv2: add testing for displaying image history and exporting image
body:
test/apiv2/10-images.at: add testing for displaying image history and
                         exporting image
test/apiv2/test-apiv2: directy return when the output option is a tar file
                       not log file

Signed-off-by: Alex Jia <chuanchang.jia@gmail.com>

Test result as follows.

comments.body:
Hi @chuanchang. Thanks for your PR.

I'm waiting for a [containers](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) member to verify that this patch is reasonable to test. If it is, they should reply with `/ok-to-test` on its own line. Until that is done, I will not automatically test new commits in this PR, but the usual testing commands by org members will still work. Regular contributors should [join the org](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) to skip this step.

Once the patch is verified, the new status will be reflected by the `ok-to-test` label.

I understand the commands that are listed [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude*, *chuanchang* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@edsantiago I just found there are several new test cases can't be run, I need to investigate it firstly, so please wait for v2 patch, thanks!

@edsantiago it exists a conflict between the test log output and tar file output (such as export/save an image tar) , please see https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/test/apiv2/test-apiv2#L202, I gave a simple fix in this patch as follows, but test result need be written into $output,
```
    if [[ $(file $WORKDIR/curl.result.out) =~ "POSIX tar archive" ]]; then
               <---- need to add test result into log
        return
    fi
```
I saw there are many $output related codes followed by https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/test/apiv2/test-apiv2#L209, I have no good idea how to solve test result output, perhaps, we can define a write_log() for it, or something like that, what do you think?

@chuanchang  I think you want [something like this](https://github.com/chuanchang/libpod/pull/1).

Note that the `return` you suggested is not a good idea: it returns before any status checks take place, so you're not actually testing anything. Please apply the patch I suggested and use that as a base for continuing.
